form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming favourite; won by 2 len Taunton on March 24 over 3300m defeating Walk In The West carrying 69kg at $7.50 in a hurdle. Last start finished second of 11 runners at this track on April 1 over 4000m, 12 len behind Prairie Diamond carrying 72kg at $3.30. Can return to winning form.

form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 34 days. Last run finished sixth of 10 starters at Taunton on March 9 over 3300m, 12 len behind Knight Templar carrying 71kg at $5.50. Before to post a big 4.5 len win. Huntingdon on February 19 over 3200m on heavy track defeating Peace In The Park with 74.5kg at $1.40 in a hurdle. Certainly worth another chance.
